thirdParty.inner_text:
From Ban To Balance: A Smarter Approach to Technology in Schools

Across the country, a growing number of policymakers and education leaders are debating whether reducing or banning screen time in schools will improve student outcomes. The concern is understandable. Families and educators alike want to ensure that technology is supporting, not harming, learning and student well-being.

Read Blog Post



thirdParty.inner_text:
CLON26: Highlights, Big Announcements, and A Look At What’s Next

CLON 2026 was our biggest gathering yet, bringing nearly 300 district IT leaders, edtech innovators, and ClassLink experts together to share ideas, tackle real challenges, and explore what’s next for digital learning. From packed sessions and hands-on workshops to in-depth conversations with peers who truly “get it,” this year’s conference was full of moments that reminded us why the ClassLink community is so special.

Read Blog Post



thirdParty.inner_text:
Why Higher Education Needs Passkeys Now

Higher education is facing a critical authentication challenge. As campuses expand digital access, security vulnerabilities have grown in tandem. Billions of breached credentials circulate online, and traditional authentication methods like passwords and conventional MFA struggle to keep pace with sophisticated phishing attacks and credential theft.

Read Blog Post



thirdParty.inner_text: ClassLink Scores Triple Category Win for Tech & Learning’s Best of 2025 AwardsTech & Learning has named ClassLink a winner of its Awards of Excellence: Best of 2025, recognizing the full ClassLink Suite across all three education categories. This distinction highlights ClassLink’s ability to support learners, educators, and institutions at every stage of the educational journey.Read News Post
thirdParty.inner_html:
ClassLink Scores Triple Category Win for Tech & Learning’s Best of 2025 Awards

Tech & Learning has named ClassLink a winner of its Awards of Excellence: Best of 2025, recognizing the full ClassLink Suite across all three education categories. This distinction highlights ClassLink’s ability to support learners, educators, and institutions at every stage of the educational journey.

Read News Post
